classes.description: A master of arms who charges into battle and protects allies through sheer resilience.
A student of the arcane arts who unleashes devastating spells from a safe distance.
A cunning combatant who uses stealth and precision to eliminate high-value targets.
A devoted healer who channels holy power to mend wounds and bolster allies in battle.
A skilled tracker and archer who excels at ranged combat and taming wild beasts.
A holy warrior who blends martial prowess with divine magic, able to both fight and heal.
